MERMAID_LEVEL0
```mermaid
flowchart TD
    GND["Ground Station"]
    ADN["Avionics Data Network"]
    GND -->|"ACARS [Air-Ground Boundary]"| ADN
    classDef boundary fill:#ffeeba,stroke:#856404
    class GND boundary
```

MERMAID_LEVEL1
```mermaid
flowchart TD
    GDS["Ground Data Link Subsystem"]
    FMS["Flight Management Subsystem"]
    GDS -->|"ACARS uplink [crossing=true]"| FMS
    classDef boundary fill:#ffeeba,stroke:#856404
    class GDS boundary
```

MERMAID_LEVEL2
```mermaid
flowchart TD
    VHF["VHF Data Radio (cmp-02)"]
    FMSCore["FMS Core (cmp-01)"]
    VHF -->|"if-01 ACARS [S:4 T:3]"| FMSCore
    classDef high fill:#f8d7da,stroke:#721c24
    class VHF high
```
